action_template.description: Create Package and First Workflow Step

action_definition.name: Claim Material In Queue
action_definition.description: Creates a work claim for queued beta material.

action_definition.name: Consume Material
action_definition.description: Records beta material consumption to prevent stage reuse.

action_definition.name: Create Empty Tube
action_definition.description: Creates a Bloom beta tube/container with Atlas linkage references.

action_definition.name: Create Extraction
action_definition.description: Creates a Bloom beta extraction output from queued material.

action_definition.name: Create Library Prep
action_definition.description: Creates a Bloom beta library-prep output from an extraction output.

action_definition.name: Create Pool
action_definition.description: Creates a Bloom beta sequencing pool from library-prep outputs.

action_definition.name: Create Run
action_definition.description: Creates a Bloom beta sequencing run and sequenced assignments.

action_definition.name: Move Material To Queue
action_definition.description: Moves Bloom beta material into a canonical beta queue.

action_definition.name: Record Post Extract QC
action_definition.description: Records post-extraction QC and optional queue progression.

action_definition.name: Register Accepted Material
action_definition.description: Creates accepted Bloom beta material and links Atlas fulfillment-item references.

action_definition.name: Release Claim
action_definition.description: Releases a work claim for queued beta material.

action_definition.name: Release Reservation
action_definition.description: Releases a reservation lock on beta material.

action_definition.name: Reserve Material
action_definition.description: Creates a reservation lock on beta material.

action_definition.name: Update Specimen
action_definition.description: Updates Bloom beta specimen Atlas collection-event reference metadata.

action_definition.name: Update Tube
action_definition.description: Updates a Bloom beta tube/container status and Atlas linkage references.
Add Parent or Child Relationships (aka lineages).
Create a Subject (decision scope) with this object as the anchor.
Print Label2
Set Status

action_definition.name: Cancel Subject Execution
action_definition.description: Cancels execution for a subject.

action_definition.name: Claim Queue Item
action_definition.description: Creates a lease and STARTED execution record for a queued subject.

action_definition.name: Complete Queue Execution
action_definition.description: Completes queued execution and advances subject state.

action_definition.name: Expire Queue Lease
action_definition.description: Expires a stale queue lease for observability cleanup.

action_definition.name: Fail Queue Execution
action_definition.description: Marks a queued execution attempt as retryable or terminal failure.

action_definition.name: Heartbeat Worker
action_definition.description: Updates worker heartbeat and liveness metadata.

action_definition.name: Place Execution Hold
action_definition.description: Places an explicit execution hold on a subject.

action_definition.name: Register Worker
action_definition.description: Registers or updates a persistent execution worker.

action_definition.name: Release Execution Hold
action_definition.description: Releases an explicit execution hold.

action_definition.name: Release Queue Lease
action_definition.description: Releases an active queue lease without completion.

action_definition.name: Renew Queue Lease
action_definition.description: Renews an active queue lease.

action_definition.name: Requeue Subject
action_definition.description: Moves a subject into READY state for a queue/action pair.
